title: AgentReady: Battle-Test Your AI Agent Before You Ship
description: 20+ teams built agents today. How many do you think are ready for the real world? AgentReady finds out.

slides.title: 20+ teams built agents today.
body: How many do you think are __ready for the real world__?
How many will __pass the reliability test__?
How many of you actually tested whether your agent __knows enough__ to do its job?
__Be honest.__
slides.notes: Pause. Let the room sit with it. Direct eye contact. The highlighted words carry the weight.

slides.title: The equation nobody checks.
body: __Agent Quality = Context × Harness × LLM__
You picked a great LLM. __That's the easy part.__
Context = your knowledge base, docs, tribal knowledge
Harness = your skills, rules, tools, system prompts
If Context is __zero__, your agent quality is __zero__.
No matter how powerful the LLM.
slides.notes: The equation should be visually prominent — larger font, accent color. The punchline: zero times anything is zero.

slides.title: We battle-test the part you built.
body: Not the LLM. __The Context + Harness.__
Upload your knowledge base — docs, READMEs, context files
Upload your harness — skills, rules, system prompts, tools
Tell us what your agent does
We simulate __real-world battle scenarios__ and find the blind spots __before your users do__.
slides.notes: Transition to solution. Keep it tight. This is where you show the upload + start screen recording.

media.note: VIDEO: Screen recording of uploading files and clicking Run battle test

slides.title: Watch it break.
body: Simulated against __800M+ real-world data points__ extracted from __17 public datasets__ across __8 business domains__.
Healthcare. Finance. Legal. SRE. E-commerce. Code review. Real estate. Customer support.
Not toy scenarios. __Real problems from real production systems.__
Edge cases. Skill gaps. Adversarial inputs. Multi-step workflows.
slides.notes: Show the progress animation — substeps ticking, probes firing. The numbers should land hard.

media.note: VIDEO: Screen recording of battle test running — substeps animating, probes completing with scores

slides.title: Your agent scored __34 out of 100__.
body: Knowledge depth: __45__ — your docs cover the basics but miss the edge cases
Harness coverage: __28__ — can't generate charts, export reports, or handle multi-step workflows
Edge case handling: __19__ — one adversarial prompt and your agent leaks internal data
__Would you invest in this agent?__
slides.notes: Show a real result. Low score = dramatic. Let 'Would you invest in this agent?' hang in the air.

media.note: VIDEO: Screen recording of results dashboard — readiness score, category breakdown, blind spots

slides.title: The business.
body: __Every company building AI agents needs this.__ That's everyone in this room.
Free: 3 battle tests/month
Pro ($49/mo): Unlimited tests, harness testing, benchmark history
Enterprise: CI/CD integration, private datasets, compliance reports
Backed by __published research__ — arXiv:2603.14057
__No competitor__ in this space — confirmed via deep research
__800M+ real-world data points__ — not synthetic
slides.notes: Quick. Money, moat, market. Don't linger. The bold words are the ones the audience remembers.

slides.title: Before you ship your next agent, ask yourself:
body: Did you test it with __real-world data__?
Or __do you think it's ready__ for the real world?
AgentReady — melodious-hotteok-80230a.netlify.app
__Ship with data, not vibes.__
slides.notes: End confrontational. Hold silence. URL stays on screen. Drop the mic.
